content:
I am currently working on device-managed work items (similar to what devm_work_autocancel does on the C side). It introduces multiple types and traits like DevmWorkItem, DevmWork and DevmWorkRegistration (plus their delayed variants) and it's not fully finished yet.

Because workqueue module has too much details in its own, I want to implement device-managed work items as a submodule of workqueue e.g. workqueue/devm_work.rs unless anyone disagrees.

Thoughts?

cc @Alice Ryhl (since you are the most active dev working on this as far as I know, apologies if that's not the case)

and it's not fully finished yet

What I meant here is that there can be more types.
I agree that we should move to a directory rather than one big file.

Please also consider using lifetimes, rather than using Devres right away, i.e. ScopedWork<'a> and on creation require a &'a Device<Bound>.

You can still provide methods to convert ScopedWork<'a> into DevresWork (or ManagedWork), similar to what I do with pci::Bar and IoMem in [1] and [2].

[1] https://lore.kernel.org/driver-core/20260525202921.124698-1-dakr@kernel.org/
[2] https://lore.kernel.org/driver-core/20260506220012.855173-3-dakr@kernel.org/
